forbidden_capabilities: production-server fallback or production workload mutation
mutable model revision, community GGUF or prebuilt model substitution
model weights, GGUF, binaries or large archives committed to Git
benchmark, model admission or production-readiness claim
mutation outside the dedicated per-run model-host root
deletion or overwrite of accepted external evidence
acceptance: owner-only issue command is exact-main and non-automatic
dedicated TAI_MODEL transport has no production credential fallback
successful exact-main Release Acceptance is required and verified
accepted human legal, source and llama.cpp evidence is verified before remote execution
only authority-declared conversion and quantization argv is executed
remote mutations remain beneath the immutable per-run root
safe retry reuses verified files and quarantines incomplete outputs
every source and output is bound by size and SHA-256
only bounded metadata and logs return to GitHub Actions
large source and GGUF bytes remain outside Git
Ruff, strict mypy, full pytest/coverage, CI and security/runtime gates pass
